title: Garlicky Velvety Croatian Chicken Breasts Hash
description: A low-sodium-friendly croatian dish featuring chicken breasts, deep-fried potatoes, and a hint of garlic. Serve hot and enjoy!
instructions: Heat olive oil in a cast-iron skillet over medium-high heat.
Season the chicken breasts with salt and dust with flour, shaking off excess.
Add the chicken breasts to the skillet and sear until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Transfer the chicken breasts to a plate and set aside.
Add the diced potatoes to the skillet and cook until golden brown, about 10-12 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Return the chicken breasts to the skillet and simmer for 5-7 minutes, or until cooked through.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve hot.
